name: crispasr-agent-transcriber
description: Transcribe and understand local audio or video files through CrispASR with local models only. Auto-detects English vs Chinese, routes to Cohere Transcribe or Qwen3-ASR, extracts audio, and can capture synced video keyframes. No cloud uploads.

interface.shortDescription: Transcribe and understand local audio/video with CrispASR
interface.longDescription: Use CrispASR Transcriber to transcribe and understand local audio or video files entirely on your machine. Auto-detects English vs Chinese using FireRed LID, routes to Cohere Transcribe or Qwen3-ASR 1.7B, extracts audio from video with ffmpeg, captures synced keyframes for video understanding, and outputs text, verbose JSON, SRT, VTT, or agent context manifests. No cloud uploads, no API keys. Supports GPU acceleration (CUDA > Vulkan > CPU).
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this local audio or video file with CrispASR
